if.if: AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_USER U2 WHERE U2.USER_ID = S.SNDNGR_ID AND U2.MBL_PHN LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%')
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_USER U2 WHERE U2.USER_ID = MSG.RGTR_ID AND U2.USERNM LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%')
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_USER U2 WHERE U2.USER_ID = MSG.RGTR_ID AND U2.MBL_PHN LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%')
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG S2 WHERE S2.MSG_ID = MSG.MSG_ID AND S2.SNDNG_CTS LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%')

mapper.select: /* SQL ID : MsgShrtntDAO.selectShrtntRcvnCnt 설 명 : 쪽지 수신 목록 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG S INNER JOIN TB_LMS_MSG MSG ON S.MSG_ID = MSG.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON MSG.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON SBJCT.DEPT_ID = DEPT.DEPT_ID WHERE S.RCVR_ID = #{rcvrId} AND S.RCVR_DELYN = 'N' AND S.SNDNGYN = 'Y'

/* SQL ID : MsgShrtntDAO.selectShrtntRcvnList 설 명 : 쪽지 수신 목록 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT S.MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG_ID , S.MSG_ID , S.SNDNG_TTL , S.SNDNGNM , S.SNDNG_DTTM , T.READ_DTTM , T.READ_YN , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL A WHERE A.REF_ID = S.MSG_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N') AS FILE_CNT , SBJCT.SBJCT_YR , SBJCT.SBJCT_SMSTR , SBJCT.SBJCTNM , SBJCT.DVCLAS_NO , DEPT.DEPTNM , ORG.ORGNM , USR.STDNT_NO , USR.USER_ID AS USER_RPRS_ID2 FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG S INNER JOIN TB_LMS_MSG MSG ON S.MSG_ID = MSG.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR T ON S.MSG_ID = T.MSG_ID AND S.RCVR_ID = T.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON MSG.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON SBJCT.DEPT_ID = DEPT.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON DEPT.ORG_ID = ORG.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON S.SNDNGR_ID = USR.USER_ID WHERE S.RCVR_ID = #{rcvrId} AND S.RCVR_DELYN = 'N' AND S.SNDNGYN = 'Y'
ORDER BY S.SNDNG_DTTM DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{lastIndex} ) WHERE RNUM >= #{firstIndex}

/* SQL ID : MsgShrtntDAO.selectShrtntRcvnDetail 설 명 : 쪽지 수신 상세 조회 */ SELECT S.MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG_ID , S.MSG_ID , S.SNDNG_TTL , S.SNDNG_CTS , S.SNDNGNM , S.SNDNGR_ID , S.SNDNG_DTTM , T.READ_DTTM , S.RCVR_ID , T.RCVRNM , MSG.TTL , MSG.TXT_CTS , MSG.SBJCT_ID , SBJCT.SBJCT_YR , SBJCT.SBJCT_SMSTR , SBJCT.SBJCTNM , SBJCT.DEPT_ID , DEPT.DEPTNM , DEPT.ORG_ID , ORG.ORGNM , USR.STDNT_NO , USR.USER_ID AS USER_RPRS_ID2 , (SELECT MAX(UC.CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT UC WHERE UC.USER_ID = S.SNDNGR_ID AND UC.CNTCT_TYCD = 'MBL_PHN') AS SNDNGR_PHNNO , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL A WHERE A.REF_ID = S.MSG_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N') AS FILE_CNT FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG S INNER JOIN TB_LMS_MSG MSG ON S.MSG_ID = MSG.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR T ON S.MSG_ID = T.MSG_ID AND S.RCVR_ID = T.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON MSG.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON SBJCT.DEPT_ID = DEPT.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON DEPT.ORG_ID = ORG.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON S.SNDNGR_ID = USR.USER_ID WHERE S.MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG_ID = #{msgShrtntSndngId} AND S.RCVR_ID = #{rcvrId} AND S.RCVR_DELYN = 'N' AND S.SNDNGYN = 'Y'
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : MsgShrtntDAO.updateShrtntReadDttm 설 명 : 쪽지 읽음 처리 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR SET READ_YN = 'Y' , READ_DTTM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE MSG_ID = (SELECT MSG_ID FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG WHERE MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG_ID = #{msgShrtntSndngId}) AND USER_ID = #{rcvrId} AND READ_YN = 'N'
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : MsgShrtntDAO.selectShrtntSndngCnt 설 명 : 쪽지 발신 목록 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_MSG MSG LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MSG_ID , MIN(CASE WHEN SNDNGYN = 'Y' THEN SNDNG_DTTM END) AS SNDNG_DTTM , MAX(SNDNGYN) AS SNDNG_YN FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG WHERE SNDNGR_DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY MSG_ID ) SS ON MSG.MSG_ID = SS.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON MSG.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON SBJCT.DEPT_ID = DEPT.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON DEPT.ORG_ID = ORG.ORG_ID WHERE MSG.RGTR_ID = #{sndngrId} AND (MSG.MSG_TYCD = 'SHRTNT' OR MSG.MSG_CTS_GBNCD = 'SHRTNT') AND (SS.MSG_ID IS NOT NULL OR MSG.RSRV_SNDNG_SDTTM IS NOT NULL)

/* SQL ID : MsgShrtntDAO.selectShrtntSndngList 설 명 : 쪽지 발신 목록 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT MSG.MSG_ID , MSG.TTL , NVL(SS.SNDNG_DTTM, MSG.RSRV_SNDNG_SDTTM) AS EFCTV_SNDNG_DTTM , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR T WHERE T.MSG_ID = MSG.MSG_ID) AS RCVR_CNT , NVL(SS.SNDNG_YN, 'N') AS SNDNG_YN , CASE WHEN MSG.RSRV_SNDNG_SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND NVL(SS.SNDNG_YN, 'N') = 'N' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RSRV_YN , NVL(SS.SNDNG_CNT, 0) AS SNDNG_SUCC_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL A WHERE A.REF_ID = MSG.MSG_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N') AS FILE_CNT , MSG.RSRV_SNDNG_CNCL_DTTM , MSG.DGRS_YR AS SBJCT_YR , MSG.SMSTR AS SBJCT_SMSTR , SBJCT.SBJCTNM , SBJCT.DVCLAS_NO , DEPT.DEPTNM , ORG.ORGNM , (SELECT S2.SNDNGNM FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG S2 WHERE S2.MSG_ID = MSG.MSG_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS SNDNGNM FROM TB_LMS_MSG MSG LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MSG_ID , MIN(CASE WHEN SNDNGYN = 'Y' THEN SNDNG_DTTM END) AS SNDNG_DTTM , COUNT(CASE WHEN SNDNGYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS SNDNG_CNT , MAX(SNDNGYN) AS SNDNG_YN FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG WHERE SNDNGR_DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY MSG_ID ) SS ON MSG.MSG_ID = SS.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON MSG.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON SBJCT.DEPT_ID = DEPT.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON DEPT.ORG_ID = ORG.ORG_ID WHERE MSG.RGTR_ID = #{sndngrId} AND (MSG.MSG_TYCD = 'SHRTNT' OR MSG.MSG_CTS_GBNCD = 'SHRTNT') AND (SS.MSG_ID IS NOT NULL OR MSG.RSRV_SNDNG_SDTTM IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY NVL(SS.SNDNG_DTTM, MSG.RSRV_SNDNG_SDTTM) DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{lastIndex} ) WHERE RNUM >= #{firstIndex}

/* SQL ID : MsgShrtntDAO.selectShrtntSndngDetail 설 명 : 쪽지 발신 상세 조회 */ SELECT MSG.MSG_ID , MSG.TTL , MSG.TXT_CTS , MSG.HTML_CTS , MSG.RSRV_SNDNG_SDTTM , MSG.RSRV_SNDNG_CNCL_DTTM , MSG.RGTR_ID AS SNDNGR_ID , (SELECT S2.SNDNGNM FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG S2 WHERE S2.MSG_ID = MSG.MSG_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS SNDNGNM , (SELECT MIN(S3.SNDNG_DTTM) FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG S3 WHERE S3.MSG_ID = MSG.MSG_ID AND S3.SNDNGYN = 'Y') AS EFCTV_SNDNG_DTTM , CASE WHEN MSG.RSRV_SNDNG_SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG S4 WHERE S4.MSG_ID = MSG.MSG_ID AND S4.SNDNGYN = 'Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RSRV_YN , SBJCT.SBJCT_YR , SBJCT.SBJCT_SMSTR , SBJCT.SBJCTNM , DEPT.DEPTNM , ORG.ORGNM , (SELECT MAX(UC.CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT UC WHERE UC.USER_ID = MSG.RGTR_ID AND UC.CNTCT_TYCD = 'MBL_PHN') AS SNDNGR_PHNNO , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL A WHERE A.REF_ID = MSG.MSG_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N') AS FILE_CNT FROM TB_LMS_MSG MSG LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON MSG.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON SBJCT.DEPT_ID = DEPT.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON DEPT.ORG_ID = ORG.ORG_ID WHERE MSG.MSG_ID = #{msgId}
AND MSG.RGTR_ID = #{sndngrId}

/* SQL ID : MsgShrtntDAO.selectShrtntSndngRcvrCnt 설 명 : 쪽지 발신 수신자 목록 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG S WHERE S.MSG_ID = #{msgId}
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_MSG M WHERE M.MSG_ID = S.MSG_ID AND M.RGTR_ID = #{sndngrId})
mapper.delete:
/* SQL ID : MsgShrtntDAO.deleteRcvTrgtr 설 명 : 수신 대상자 삭제 */ DELETE FROM TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR WHERE MSG_ID = #{msgId}
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_MSG M WHERE M.MSG_ID = #{msgId} AND M.RGTR_ID = #{sndngrId})

/* SQL ID : MsgShrtntDAO.deleteShrtntSndng 설 명 : 쪽지 발송 삭제 (미발송 예약건) */ DELETE FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG WHERE MSG_ID = #{msgId} AND SNDNGYN = 'N'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_MSG M WHERE M.MSG_ID = #{msgId} AND M.RGTR_ID = #{sndngrId})

sql.if: AND (U.USERNM LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR U.STDNT_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR U.USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%')
AND (U.USERNM LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR U.STDNT_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR U.USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%')

mapper.select: /* SQL ID : MsgShrtntDAO.selectShrtntRcvrSearchAllCnt 설 명 : 관리자 받는 사람 검색 건수 조회 (전체 회원) */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_USER U LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON U.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID WHERE 1=1

/* SQL ID : MsgShrtntDAO.selectShrtntRcvrSearchAllList 설 명 : 관리자 받는 사람 검색 목록 조회 (전체 회원) */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT U.USER_ID , U.USERNM , U.STDNT_NO , U.USER_TYCD , U.USER_ID AS USER_RPRS_ID2 , D.DEPTNM , (SELECT MAX(UC.CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT UC WHERE UC.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND UC.CNTCT_TYCD = 'MBL_PHN') AS MBL_PHN , (SELECT MAX(UC.CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT UC WHERE UC.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND UC.CNTCT_TYCD = 'INDV_EML') AS EML FROM TB_LMS_USER U LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON U.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY U.USERNM ASC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{lastIndex} ) WHERE RNUM >= #{firstIndex}

/* SQL ID : MsgShrtntDAO.selectShrtntRcvrSearchCnt 설 명 : 받는 사람 검색 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT U.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A INNER JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON A.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID INNER JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON A.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON S.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID WHERE S.DELYN = 'N' AND D.ORG_ID = #{orgId}
GROUP BY U.USER_ID, U.USERNM, U.STDNT_NO, U.USER_TYCD, D.DEPTNM, S.SBJCTNM )

/* SQL ID : MsgShrtntDAO.selectShrtntRcvrSearchList 설 명 : 받는 사람 검색 목록 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT U.USER_ID , U.USERNM , U.STDNT_NO , U.USER_TYCD , U.USER_ID AS USER_RPRS_ID2 , D.DEPTNM , S.SBJCTNM , (SELECT MAX(UC.CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT UC WHERE UC.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND UC.CNTCT_TYCD = 'MBL_PHN') AS MBL_PHN , (SELECT MAX(UC.CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT UC WHERE UC.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND UC.CNTCT_TYCD = 'INDV_EML') AS EML FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A INNER JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON A.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID INNER JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON A.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON S.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID WHERE S.DELYN = 'N' AND D.ORG_ID = #{orgId}
GROUP BY U.USER_ID, U.USERNM, U.STDNT_NO, U.USER_TYCD, D.DEPTNM, S.SBJCTNM ORDER BY U.USERNM ASC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{lastIndex} ) WHERE RNUM >= #{firstIndex}
